---
title: "Course Overview"
subtitle: "Programming for Engineers and Scientists"
author: "Christopher Burger"
institute: "University of Mississippi | School of Engineering"
format: 
  html:
    theme: default
    toc: true
    toc-title: "On this page"
    toc-depth: 2
    css: styles.css
---

This is the central repository for the lecture notes for CSCI/CISE 1056. These notes provide an overview of the content covered during lecture and will be available as the reference during lab.

More in-depth information from the official textbook can be found in the supplementary reading folder in each content section of Blackboard.
